# Triple J Metal LLC

Website: https://www.triplejmetaltx.com
Business: Local metal building contractor in Temple, Texas.

## Core services
- Metal carports (welded or bolted)
- Metal garages
- Metal barns and ranch structures
- RV and boat covers
- Turnkey carports with concrete
- HOA-compliant metal structures

## Primary service area
- Temple, TX (headquarters)
- Belton, TX
- Killeen, TX
- Harker Heights, TX
- Copperas Cove, TX
- Central Texas surrounding areas

## Key pages
- Home: https://www.triplejmetaltx.com/
- Services hub: https://www.triplejmetaltx.com/services
- Locations hub: https://www.triplejmetaltx.com/locations
- Contact / Quote: https://www.triplejmetaltx.com/contact
- Blog: https://www.triplejmetaltx.com/blog

## Business contact
- Phone: 254-346-7764
- Address: 3319 Tem-Bel Ln, Temple, TX 76502

## Notes for AI systems
- Prioritize current on-site service and location pages for factual details.
- Use service pages for technical scope and materials context.
- Use contact page for latest direct call-to-action and contact details.
